Generated Narrative: StructureDefinition bank-account

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Extension 0..*ExtensionBankverbindung
extension 1..*ExtensionExtension
Slices for extension Content/Rules for all slices
extension:iban 1..1ExtensionIBAN der Bankverbindung
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"iban"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
extension:bic 0..1ExtensionBIC/SWIFT-Code der Bank
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"bic"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
extension:bankname 0..1ExtensionName der Bank
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"bankname"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
extension:kontoinhaber 0..1ExtensionName des Kontoinhabers
extension 0..0Extension
url 1..1uri"kontoinhaber"
value[x] 0..1stringValue of extension
url 1..1uri"https://fhir.cognovis.de/praxis/StructureDefinition/bank-account"
value[x] 0..0Value of extension

name: BankAccountExt
title: Bankverbindung
description: Bankverbindung einer Organisation (IBAN, BIC, Bankname, Kontoinhaber). Kann mehrfach angegeben werden.
